home.title: EPUB Translator
home.description: Translate your EPUB books with AI quickly and accurately.
home.content: Select a file, configure the output, and run the full translation from this screen.

translation.title: Translate EPUB
translation.description: Pick a .epub file, choose a language, and export the translated file.
translation.moreLanguagesSoon: This list is extensible. The MVP starts with Spanish.
translation.fullModeHint: Translate the entire book chapter by chapter.

errors.noApiKey: You must configure a valid API key before translating.
errors.noOutput: Select the output path for the translated EPUB.
